title: Pack of 2 Large Silicone Cooking Spoons,Non Stick Solid Basting Spoon,Heat-Resistant Kitchen Utensils for Mixing,Serving,Draining,Stirring (Black)
features: More Safe and Healthy : Our silicone spoons are made of food-grade silicone, free of BPA;Even at high temperatures, there is no need to worry about melting or deforming;And the soft silicone head won't scratch the coating, it can better protect your pot

Thoughtful Design : The good-quality 18/8 stainless steel keeps you away from the trouble of kitchen utensils rusting or breaking; This anti-scald silicone handle is not easy to conduct heat and is more comfortable to hold than traditional utensils
Easy to Clean : After each use, just wipe with hot water, you can easily clean excess fat and food; The design of the round hanging hole makes it easy to dry and hang

Just Want To Provide The Ideas For You : Large cooking spoon used to hold food more convenient; Slotted Spoon can quickly drain the water; Whether it is used for draining or serving food, our large silicone cooking spoon will add more fun to your kitchen

Our Service : No one is born to be a good cook, but good kitchenware often gets twice the result with half the effort; Bundlepro is a trusted kitchen utensil expert, we have been committed to providing customers with the good product and service
description: Product Description Who are we ? Cooking is a joy. In the past few years, Bundlepro has brought joy to the kitchens of thousands of American families. We firmly believe in the power of food. Every dish, whether it ’s for yourself or someone you love, is a warmth. In the world, only love and delicious food can not be let down! No one is born to be a good cook, but good kitchenware often gets you twice the result with half the effort. Now we will accompany you to begin a happy kitchen journey, perhaps, you are the next Socrates in the kitchen!
